response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong testing discipline and broad polyglot experience, but the resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work (National Instruments, 2014-2015) against a hard requirement of 8 years C++. Core background is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with limited evidence of large-scale distributed-systems or cloud-platform leadership at the scope this role demands.
strengths: Long tenure as senior IC with mentoring, workshops, and TDD/CI advocacy
Exposure to high-throughput micro-services (Dunnhumby, millions of req/sec)
Breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps tooling
concerns: Falls ~7.5 years short of the 8-year C++ minimum
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-infrastructure ownership
No formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform/large-scale infra leadership
